docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $570.00 FILED BY ELGAWADY, ABDELKADER AS TO DEFENDANT AL-HORESY, SAAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ABDELKADER ELGAWADY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAAD AL-HORESY. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED JUN-09-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AL-HORESY, SAAD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELGAWADY, ABDELKADER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AL-HORESY, SAAD $170.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $240.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
